case_title: STEPHEN RALPH DAVIS VS. JULIE PHAM et al

docket_entries.description: DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE
ADDED TO PROOF OF SERVICE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE CALENDAR HEARING SET FOR APR-16-2002 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 212
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF JUL-08-2002 IS OFF CALENDAR DISMISSAL FILED. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF DAVIS, STEPHEN RALPH AS TO DEFENDANT PHAM, JULIE DOES 1 TO 5 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          MAY-24-2002 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  FEB-22-2002 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       APR-26-2002
DECLARATION BY COUNSEL IN RESPONSE TO ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE RE: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED BY PLAINTIFF DAVIS, STEPHEN RALPH
BEFORE HEARING, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS ORDERED OFF CALENDAR BY COURT. (212)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JUL-08-2002 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE MAY-24-2002 STATUS CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE EACH PARTY TO BEAR IT'S OWN COSTS
